description:
Configure activity completion tracking and access restrictions in the 'Workplace Ergonomics' course.

1. Log in to Moodle as admin (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!).
2. Navigate to the 'Workplace Ergonomics' course (Shortname: ERGO101).
3. Turn on Edit mode.
4. Edit the settings for the 'Ergonomics Guide' Page activity.
5. Under 'Activity completion', change 'Completion tracking' to 'Show activity as complete when conditions are met'.
6. Check the box 'Student must view this activity to complete it' and save.
7. Edit the settings for the 'Policy Acknowledgment' Choice activity.
8. Under 'Restrict access', click 'Add restriction...' and select 'Activity completion'.
9. Configure the restriction so the student must match the following: Activity completion of 'Ergonomics Guide' must be marked complete.
10. Save the settings and return to the course.
